    Class
    Description
    class 
    StandingOrderCashaccount
    Concrete standing order subclass for cash-account transactions (WITHDRAWAL and DEPOSIT).
    class 
    StandingOrderSecurity
    Concrete standing order subclass for security transactions (ACCUMULATE and REDUCE).

    Class

    class 
    StandingOrderJpaRepositoryImpl
    Repository implementation for standing orders with validation logic for scheduling parameters, transaction type constraints, tenant limits, and initial next-execution-date computation.

    Methods in grafioschtrader.service with parameters of type StandingOrder
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static LocalDate
    StandingOrderExecutionService.computeNextExecutionDate(StandingOrder so, LocalDate lastScheduledDate)
    Computes the next execution date based on the standing order's repeat configuration.
    List<StandingOrderFailure>
    StandingOrderExecutionService.processSingleStandingOrder(StandingOrder so, LocalDate processingDate)
    Processes a single standing order, iterating through all due execution dates (catch-up loop).
